name: Dragon Ball - RPG (optional NSFW)
description: Welcome to your own dragon ball z world! Here you can create your own story however you want to. If you want the bot to remember very specific parts of the story, please write it in the summary so the bot can remember. NSFW is an option but is completely your own choice. This bot will (hopefully) not force you into it, if you dont want to. Good luck with your adventure have fun now!
creator: AestheticKingBrah
